'''Torith''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He became an important and powerful figure in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] regime by taking control of [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] which were on the verge of joining the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] and bringing them back into the fold of the Empire.

He once made a surprise visit to the [[Cynestra Space Craft Show]] when he discovered that [[Tay Industries]] was revealing its new [[D-Wing Space Superiority Fighter]] to see if he could use it in his fight against the Rebellion. Unfortunately for him, a group of Rebels was also present who had planned on stealing the D-wing. After learning of Torith's appearance, however, their plans changed to include killing him also. This plan succeeded, and the Rebels made off with the D-wing prototype, leaving behind the dead form of Grand Moff Torith.
